hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞；【WORLD】特朗普称战争将“很快结束”，伊朗正在考虑美国的提议；【WORLD】巴黎圣日耳曼欧冠夺冠后巴黎派对发生骚乱并逮捕127人。

items.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
items.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.
items.title_zh: Anthropic首席执行官警告网络“危险时刻”，因为人工智能暴露了数千个漏洞
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫迪 (Dario Amodei) 警告称，人工智能为软件公司、政府和银行修复数以万计的漏洞创造了一个狭窄的窗口。

items.title: Iran considering US proposal as Trump says war will be 'over quickly'
items.summary: Mediator Pakistan says it is "endeavouring to convert this ceasefire into a permanent end to this war".
items.title_zh: 特朗普称战争将“很快结束”，伊朗正在考虑美国的提议
items.summary_zh: 调解人巴基斯坦表示，它“正在努力将停火转变为这场战争的永久结束”。

items.title: Disturbances and 127 arrests mar Paris party after PSG Champions League victory
items.summary: Fans took to the streets to celebrate the Paris team's qualification for the final, but celebrations were marred by disturbances.
items.title_zh: 巴黎圣日耳曼欧冠夺冠后巴黎派对发生骚乱并逮捕127人
items.summary_zh: 球迷们走上街头庆祝巴黎队晋级决赛，但庆祝活动却因骚乱而受到破坏。

items.title: TD Cowen raises Strategy price target to $395 on shift toward STRC issuance and improved BTC Yield outlook
items.summary: TD Cowen raised its MSTR price target to $395, citing an STRC preferred issuance shift and a revised BTC Yield forecast for fiscal 2026.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 将策略目标价格提高至 395 美元，转向发行 STRC 并改善 BTC 收益率前景
items.summary_zh: TD Cowen 将 MSTR 价格目标上调至 395 美元，理由是 STRC 优先发行的转变以及修订后的 2026 财年 BTC 收益率预测。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
items.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant：更智能、更清晰、更个性化
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.5 即时更新 ChatGPT 的默认模型，提供更智能、更准确的答案、减少幻觉并改进个性化控制。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Awaits Tehran’s Response to Peace Proposal
items.summary: An Iranian official said that Tehran would convey its reply through Pakistan, a key mediator. Another Iranian official had earlier dismissed a reported proposal to end the war as a “list of American wishes.”
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国等待德黑兰对和平提议的回应
items.summary_zh: 一名伊朗官员表示，德黑兰将通过关键调解人巴基斯坦转达答复。另一位伊朗官员早些时候驳回了据报道的结束战争的提议，称其为“美国的愿望清单”。

items.title: Bitcoin tests Bollinger Bands breakout as creator flips bullish on BTC
items.summary: A related MVRV indicator hit overheated levels last seen before bitcoin's late-2024 push to $100,000.
items.title_zh: 比特币测试布林带突破，创造者看好比特币
items.summary_zh: 相关的 MVRV 指标在比特币 2024 年末升至 10 万美元之前曾触及过热水平。

items.title: Bitwise CEO says four-year crypto cycle is dead as institutional era takes hold
items.summary: Bitwise's Horsley said the four-year cycle is dead and called Strategy's STRC a "juggernaut" set to push bitcoin into fixed income markets.
items.title_zh: Bitwise首席执行官表示，随着制度时代的到来，四年的加密货币周期已经结束
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 的 Horsley 表示，四年周期已经结束，并称 Strategy 的 STRC 是推动比特币进入固定收益市场的“主宰者”。

items.title: Enabling privacy-preserving AI training on everyday devices
items.summary: A new method could bring more accurate and efficient AI models to high-stakes applications like health care and finance, even in under-resourced settings.
items.title_zh: 在日常设备上启用保护隐私的人工智能训练
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以为医疗保健和金融等高风险应用带来更准确、更高效的人工智能模型，即使在资源贫乏的环境中也是如此。

items.title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
items.summary: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌12%
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title: Asian Development Bank's $70 billion energy and digital infra push puts Southeast Asia center stage
items.summary: Southeast Asia to benefit significantly from Asian Development Bank's $70 billion new energy and digital infrastructure plan in Asia and the Pacific by 2035.
items.title_zh: 亚洲开发银行斥资 700 亿美元推动能源和数字基础设施建设，使东南亚成为焦点
items.summary_zh: 到 2035 年，东南亚将从亚洲开发银行在亚太地区 700 亿美元的新能源和数字基础设施计划中受益匪浅。

items.title: Goodbye quarterly earnings? Here's when traders believe this big change will happen
items.summary: Traders are evenly divided as to whether the change will happen by Jan. 1. That would be an unusually fast timeline for the commission.
items.title_zh: 告别季度收益？这是交易者相信这一重大变化将会发生的时候
items.summary_zh: 对于是否会在 1 月 1 日之前发生这一变化，交易员们意见不一。对于委员会来说，这将是一个异常快的时间表。

items.title: Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams 'egregious' practices at rival insurers
items.summary: Apollo CEO Marc Rowan warned that markets face an elevated risk of unexpected shocks, saying he is positioning the firm defensively for an expected correction.
items.title_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官罗文警告市场调整，抨击竞争对手保险公司的“恶劣”做法
items.summary_zh: 阿波罗首席执行官马克·罗文（Marc Rowan）警告说，市场面临意外冲击的风险较高，并表示他正在为公司做好防御性调整，以应对预期的调整。

items.title: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports
items.summary: The SEC formally proposed a rule change that would allow companies to file semiannual reports on a new form, 10-S, in place of the traditional quarterly10-Qs
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会推进特朗普支持的终止强制性季度收益报告的提案
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 正式提议修改规则，允许公司以新表格 10-S 提交半年报，以取代传统的季度 10-Q 表格

items.title: Fears of renewed Gaza war as Hamas disarmament talks stall
items.summary: Israeli media reports suggest Israel is preparing to resume fighting because of the impasse in talks with Hamas.
items.title_zh: 哈马斯裁军谈判陷入僵局，人们担心加沙战争会再次爆发
items.summary_zh: 以色列媒体报道称，由于与哈马斯的谈判陷入僵局，以色列正准备恢复战斗。

items.title: German Leaders Clash With Spy Chiefs Over Domestic Threat From Iran
items.summary: Intelligence agents have privately warned of the potential of hybrid attacks from Iran-linked groups. But political leaders, including Chancellor Friedrich Merz, have publicly played down the risk.
items.title_zh: 德国领导人因伊朗国内威胁与间谍头目发生冲突
items.summary_zh: 情报人员私下警告称，与伊朗有关的组织可能会发动混合攻击。但包括德国总理弗里德里希·梅尔茨在内的政治领导人公开淡化了这一风险。

items.title: In Hungary, Voters Exposed the Limits of China’s Ties to Orban
items.summary: Beijing depended on Hungary’s outgoing leader, Viktor Orban, to gain a toehold in Europe. A giant battery factory proved a step too far.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利选民暴露了中国与欧尔班关系的局限性
items.summary_zh: 北京依靠即将卸任的匈牙利领导人欧尔班·维克多(Viktor Orban)在欧洲站稳脚跟。事实证明，建立一个巨型电池工厂迈出了一步。

items.title: Russia Ramps Up Threats Toward Ukraine Over Victory Day Parade
items.summary: Kremlin officials said a large strike on Kyiv would be “inevitable” if Ukraine disrupted the May 9 event, a prospect President Volodymyr Zelensky has appeared to allude to.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯在胜利日阅兵上加大对乌克兰的威胁
items.summary_zh: 克里姆林宫官员表示，如果乌克兰扰乱 5 月 9 日的活动，对基辅的大规模袭击将“不可避免”，总统泽连斯基似乎也提到了这一点。

items.title: Kalshi confirms $1 billion raise at $22 billion valuation amid prediction market boom
items.summary: Institutional trading volume surged 800% over the past six months on the platform, while annualized trading activity reached $178 billion despite growing regulatory scrutiny.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 确认在预测市场繁荣之际以 220 亿美元估值筹集 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 过去六个月，该平台上的机构交易量激增 800%，尽管监管审查日益严格，但年化交易活动仍达到 1,780 亿美元。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) drops 1.2%, leading index lower
items.summary: Near Protocol (NEAR), down 1% from Wednesday, was also an underperformer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：比特币现金 (BCH) 下跌 1.2%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: Near Protocol (NEAR) 较周三下跌 1%，也表现不佳。

items.title: Kraken to buy stablecoin payments firm Reap in $600 million deal: Bloomberg
items.summary: Kraken owner Payward will acquire Hong Kong-based Reap Technologies as the crypto exchange expands its stablecoin and payments infrastructure business in Asia.
items.title_zh: Kraken 将斥资 6 亿美元收购稳定币支付公司 Reap：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 随着加密货币交易所扩大其在亚洲的稳定币和支付基础设施业务，Kraken 所有者 Payward 将收购总部位于香港的 Reap Technologies。

items.title: Crypto ETF boom continues with debut of first fund to track Canton
items.summary: A new crypto exchange-traded fund has entered the chat — the 21shares Canton Network ETF made its debut on Nasdaq Thursday.
items.title_zh: 首只跟踪 Canton 的基金首次亮相，加密货币 ETF 热潮持续
items.summary_zh: 一种新的加密货币交易所交易基金已加入讨论——21shares Canton Network ETF 周四在纳斯达克首次亮相。

items.title: Kalshi hits $22 billion valuation after $1 billion raise led by Coatue
items.summary: Kalshi reached a $22 billion valuation after a $1 billion Series F, as institutional volume surged 800% since November 2025.
items.title_zh: 在 Coatue 领投的 10 亿美元融资后，Kalshi 估值达到 220 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 在完成 10 亿美元的 F 轮融资后估值达到 220 亿美元，机构交易量自 2025 年 11 月以来飙升 800%。

items.title: Kraken parent Payward to acquire Hong Kong stablecoin firm Reap for $600 million
items.summary: Kraken parent Payward agreed to buy Hong Kong stablecoin payments firm Reap Technologies for $600 million in another acquisition.
items.title_zh: Kraken母公司Payward将以6亿美元收购香港稳定币公司Reap
items.summary_zh: Kraken 母公司 Payward 同意在另一项收购中以 6 亿美元收购香港稳定币支付公司 Reap Technologies。

items.title: Singular Bank helps bankers move fast with ChatGPT and Codex
items.summary: Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.
items.title_zh: Singular Bank 通过 ChatGPT 和 Codex 帮助银行家快速行动
items.summary_zh: Singular Bank 使用 ChatGPT 和 Codex 构建了 Singularity，这是一款内部助手，可帮助银行家每天在会议准备、投资组合分析和跟进方面节省 60-90 分钟的时间。

items.title: New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
items.summary: OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, CPC bidding, and enhanced measurement tools—built to protect privacy and keep conversations separate from ads.
items.title_zh: 购买 ChatGPT 广告的新方式
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过测试版自助广告管理器、每次点击费用出价和增强的测量工具扩展了 ChatGPT 广告，旨在保护隐私并将对话与广告分开。

items.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
items.summary: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道合作重新构想 CFO 办公室
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和普华永道正在合作，帮助企业使用人工智能代理实现财务工作流程自动化、改进预测、加强控制以及实现 CFO 职能现代化。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.
items.title_zh: 庆祝 Google 翻译 20 周年：有趣的事实、提示和值得尝试的新功能
items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: 'JaredfromSubway' bot front runs Vitalik Buterin's $4 token swap with $1 million in volume
items.summary: The Ethereum co-founder, who has spent months campaigning against toxic MEV with proposals for encrypted mempools, just had one of his own swaps front-run and back-run by the network's most notorious sandwich bot.
items.title_zh: “JaredfromSubway”机器人前端运行 Vitalik Buterin 的 4 美元代币交换，交易量为 100 万美元
items.summary_zh: 这位以太坊联合创始人花了几个月的时间反对有毒的 MEV，并提出了加密内存池的建议，他刚刚让网络上最臭名昭著的三明治机器人抢先运行和后运行了自己的一项交换。

items.title: Consensus Miami Day 3: Real-time coverage and highlights from on the ground
items.summary: It's day three of Consensus Miami 2026 on Thursday. Stay tuned for updates throughout the day.
items.title_zh: 迈阿密共识第三天：现场实时报道和亮点
items.summary_zh: 周四是 2026 年迈阿密共识会议的第三天。请全天关注更新。

items.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
items.summary: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions.
items.title_zh: Parloa 建立客户想要交谈的服务代理
items.summary_zh: Parloa 利用 OpenAI 模型为可扩展、语音驱动的 AI 客户服务代理提供支持，使企业能够设计、模拟和部署可靠的实时交互。

items.title: Introducing ChatGPT Futures: Class of 2026
items.summary: Meet the ChatGPT Futures Class of 2026—26 student innovators using AI to build, research, and drive real-world impact. Discover how this generation is redefining learning, creativity, and opportunity with ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 期货简介：2026 届毕业生
items.summary_zh: 来认识一下 2026 年 ChatGPT 未来班 — 26 名学生创新者，他们使用 AI 来构建、研究和推动现实世界的影响。了解这一代人如何通过 ChatGPT 重新定义学习、创造力和机会。

items.title: How frontier enterprises are building an AI advantage
items.summary: OpenAI’s B2B Signals research shows how frontier enterprises deepen AI adoption, scale Codex-powered agentic workflows, and build durable competitive advantage.
items.title_zh: 前沿企业如何打造AI优势
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 的 B2B 信号研究展示了前沿企业如何深化人工智能采用、扩展 Codex 支持的代理工作流程以及建立持久的竞争优势。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 4 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 4 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的科学家们建立了世界上最大的奥林匹克级数学问题集，并向所有人开放
items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Uber and Disney are seeing the same remarkable dynamic in this economy. Both stocks are surging
items.summary: Uber and Disney pointed to a resilient spending backdrop, with consumers continuing to shell out for rides, food delivery, vacations and theme park trips.
items.title_zh: 优步和迪士尼在当前经济中也看到了同样显着的动态。两只股票都在飙升
items.summary_zh: 优步和迪士尼指出了消费背景的弹性，消费者继续为乘车、送餐、度假和主题公园旅行付费。

items.title: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones
items.summary: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks.
items.title_zh: 英特尔和美光准备打破重大里程碑
items.summary_zh: 期权交易者无法获得足够的半导体股票。

items.title: After Coinbase, prediction market traders forecast more tech layoffs ahead
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platforms give a high probability to layoffs in the tech sector reaching more than 447,000 jobs in 2026.
items.title_zh: 继Coinbase之后，预测市场交易员预测未来还会有更多科技公司裁员
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员预计，2026 年科技行业裁员人数将超过 44.7 万个。

items.title: Milken-adjacent Power100 attendees aim to reclaim the DEI in finance narrative
items.summary: Blueprint Capital's Power100 weekend convenes diverse leaders in finance ahead of the Milken Institute Global Conference.
items.title_zh: 米尔肯相邻的 Power100 与会者旨在重新夺回金融叙事中的 DEI
items.summary_zh: Blueprint Capital 的 Power100 周末在米尔肯研究所全球会议之前聚集了金融界的不同领导人。

items.title: Race to trace passengers who left hantavirus cruise ship at island
items.summary: A 69-year-old woman who later died in South Africa is among those who left MV Hondius at St Helena.
items.title_zh: 竞相追踪在岛上离开汉坦病毒游轮的乘客
items.summary_zh: 在圣赫勒拿岛离开 MV Hondius 的人中包括一名 69 岁的妇女，后来在南非去世。

items.title: Three women linked to Islamic State arrested in Australia on return from Syria
items.summary: Three women who allegedly supported IS were arrested after they flew home to Australia for the first time in years.
items.title_zh: 三名与伊斯兰国有关的妇女从叙利亚回国后在澳大利亚被捕
items.summary_zh: 三名涉嫌支持伊斯兰国的妇女多年来首次飞回澳大利亚后被捕。

items.title: US judge releases Jeffrey Epstein's purported suicide note
items.summary: Epstein's former cellmate claims he found the note, which has not been verified by the BBC.
items.title_zh: 美国法官公布了杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的遗书
items.summary_zh: 爱泼斯坦的前狱友声称他发现了这张纸条，但这一消息尚未得到英国广播公司 (BBC) 的证实。

items.title: China announces suspended death sentences for former defence ministers
items.summary: The announcement follows recent ousting of several top officials in China's military.
items.title_zh: 中国宣布暂缓执行前国防部长死刑
items.summary_zh: 此前，中国军方几名高级官员最近被罢黜。

items.title: South Africa condemns 'fake videos' of alleged xenophobic attacks
items.summary: As claims of xenophobia in South Africa mount, Ghana calls on the African Union to send a fact-finding mission.
items.title_zh: 南非谴责涉嫌仇外袭击的“虚假视频”
items.summary_zh: 随着南非仇外情绪的增加，加纳呼吁非洲联盟派遣实况调查团。

items.title: 'My heart is in a million pieces': Vigils in Australia for five-year-old allegedly killed in Outback
items.summary: Kumanjayi Little Baby was found dead after going missing from an Aboriginal town camp in Alice Springs.
items.title_zh: “我的心碎成一百万片”：澳大利亚为据称在内陆地区被杀的五岁儿童守夜
items.summary_zh: 库曼贾伊小婴儿在爱丽斯泉的一个原住民城镇营地失踪后被发现死亡。

items.title: Superdry co-founder James Holder jailed for rape
items.summary: James Holder's victim told her attacker he took her "choice, dignity and body".
items.title_zh: Superdry联合创始人詹姆斯·霍尔德因强奸罪入狱
items.summary_zh: 詹姆斯·霍尔德的受害者告诉袭击者，他夺走了她的“选择、尊严和身体”。

items.title: Starmer Braces for Local Election Losses Amid New Era of UK Politics
items.summary: Polls predict historic losses for Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s Labour Party on Thursday as anti-immigrant Reform U.K. makes gains, and a new era of multiparty politics takes shape.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默为英国政治新时代的地方选举失利做好准备
items.summary_zh: 民意调查预测，随着反移民改革英国取得进展，多党政治的新时代正在形成，首相基尔·斯塔默领导的工党周四将遭遇历史性损失。

items.title: New NTSB Report Into Deadly China Eastern Crash Suggests Struggle in Cockpit
items.summary: A report by the U.S. National Transportation Safety Board offers new details about the China Eastern Airlines crash in 2022, which killed all 132 people on board.
items.title_zh: 美国国家运输安全委员会关于东航致命空难的新报告表明驾驶舱内存在挣扎
items.summary_zh: 美国国家运输安全委员会的一份报告提供了 2022 年中国东方航空公司坠机事故的新细节，该事故造成机上 132 人全部遇难。

items.title: A Project in Europe Tested Whether Students Could Live Without Smartphones
items.summary: For three weeks, thousands of children in Europe went without social media or their smartphones, or both. This is the diary of their digital detox.
items.title_zh: 欧洲的一个项目测试学生是否可以在没有智能手机的情况下生活
items.summary_zh: 三个星期以来，欧洲数千名儿童没有社交媒体或智能手机，或两者都没有。这是他们的数字戒毒日记。

items.title: China Sentences 2 Former Defense Ministers on Bribery Charges
items.summary: Gen. Wei Fenghe and Gen. Li Shangfu are likely to spend the rest of their lives in prison after receiving suspended death sentences.
items.title_zh: 中国以受贿罪判处两名前国防部长
items.summary_zh: 魏凤和将军和李尚福将军在被判处死刑缓期执行后，很可能在监狱中度过余生。

items.title: Trump to Host Brazil’s President Lula at White House After Months of Ups and Downs
items.summary: President Trump and President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva, who have had a rocky relationship, will meet on Thursday for talks on security, trade and critical minerals.
items.title_zh: 经过数月的起伏后，特朗普将在白宫接待巴西总统卢拉
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统和路易斯·伊纳西奥·卢拉·达席尔瓦总统的关系一直不稳定，他们将于周四会面，就安全、贸易和关键矿产问题进行会谈。

items.title: Australian Women and Children Linked to ISIS Fighters Return Home
items.summary: The police said two of them would face charges of crimes against humanity and the third would face a charge of belonging to a terrorist group.

items.summary_zh: 警方表示，其中两人将面临反人类罪指控，第三人将面临属于恐怖组织的指控。

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: beneath the crypto surface
items.summary: Beneath the stalled market, advisors and long-term investors are quietly building durable crypto allocations and are becoming more comfortable investing in this asset class.
items.title_zh: 顾问加密货币：加密货币表面之下
items.summary_zh: 在停滞的市场之下，顾问和长期投资者正在悄悄建立持久的加密货币配置，并变得更加舒适地投资于这一资产类别。

items.title: The $700 million migration: Why Solv Protocol is ditching LayerZero for Chainlink
items.summary: The combined migrations by Solv and Kelp shift nearly $1 billion in assets to Chainlink's CCIP, reflecting an industry "flight to quality."
items.title_zh: 7 亿美元的迁移：为什么 Solv Protocol 放弃 LayerZero 转而使用 Chainlink
items.summary_zh: Solv 和 Kelp 的合并迁移将近 10 亿美元的资产转移到 Chainlink 的 CCIP，反映出行业“向质量倾斜”。

items.title: Aave to overhaul collateral and listing standards after KelpDAO exploit
items.summary: The lending giant is expanding its asset listing criteria beyond financial risk to include cybersecurity and architecture, and wants the rest of DeFi to follow.
items.title_zh: 在 KelpDAO 被利用后，Aave 将彻底改革抵押品和上市标准
items.summary_zh: 这家贷款巨头正在将其资产上市标准扩展到金融风险之外，将网络安全和架构纳入其中，并希望其他 DeFi 领域也能效仿。

items.title: Bitwise enters tokenization in takeover of Superstate’s $267 million 'carry fund'
items.summary: The crypto asset manager will take over Superstate’s $267 million USCC fund as tokenized investment products gain traction with institutions.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 进入代币化阶段，收购 Superstate 2.67 亿美元的“套利基金”
items.summary_zh: 随着代币化投资产品受到机构的青睐，加密资产管理公司将接管 Superstate 2.67 亿美元的 USCC 基金。

items.title: AWS taps Coinbase and Stripe to power USDC payments for AI agents
items.summary: In the growing agentic economy, stablecoins are emerging as a key payment rail because of their low cost and programmability.
items.title_zh: AWS 利用 Coinbase 和 Stripe 为 AI 代理提供 USDC 支付
items.summary_zh: 在不断增长的代理经济中，稳定币因其低成本和可编程性而正在成为关键的支付渠道。

items.title: Bitwise to take over Superstate’s $267 million tokenized Crypto Carry Fund
items.summary: USCC will be renamed the Bitwise Crypto Carry Fund while keeping the same ticker, smart contracts, and token address.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 将接管 Superstate 2.67 亿美元的代币化加密货币基金
items.summary_zh: USCC 将更名为 Bitwise Crypto Carry Fund，同时保留相同的股票代码、智能合约和代币地址。

items.title: Mysten Labs’ Abiodun says Sui processed over $1 trillion in stablecoin volume since August as it eyes free, private payments
items.summary: Sui processed over $1 trillion in stablecoin volume since August as Mysten Labs' Abiodun eyes a zero-fee and private payments rollout.
items.title_zh: Mysten Labs 的 Abiodun 表示，Sui 自 8 月份以来处理了超过 1 万亿美元的稳定币交易量，因为它着眼于免费的私人支付
items.summary_zh: 自 8 月份以来，Sui 处理了超过 1 万亿美元的稳定币交易量，Mysten Labs 的 Abiodun 着眼于推出零费用和私人支付。

items.title: Kraken co-CEO says tokenized equities won’t ‘open the floodgates’ for institutions overnight
items.summary: Sethi noted that most current demand is coming from fintech firms and users in emerging markets rather than large U.S. financial institutions.
items.title_zh: Kraken 联合首席执行官表示，代币化股票不会在一夜之间为机构“打开闸门”
items.summary_zh: Sethi 指出，当前大部分需求来自新兴市场的金融科技公司和用户，而不是美国大型金融机构。

items.title: Pantera says $321 billion tokenization market remains in ‘newspaper-on-a-website’ phase despite 60% growth
items.summary: Pantera said that the $321 billion tokenization market is still in a "newspaper-on-a-website" phase, with 77.6% of assets still just wrappers.
items.title_zh: Pantera 表示，尽管增长了 60%，但 3210 亿美元的代币化市场仍处于“网站报纸”阶段
items.summary_zh: Pantera 表示，3210 亿美元的代币化市场仍处于“网站报纸”阶段，77.6% 的资产仍只是包装。

items.title: Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
